svg.title: MalariAI v2 Task Roadmap
svg.desc: Step-by-step task breakdown for three improvements leading to e2e evaluation
svg.text: 1.2 Run full e2e on BBBC041 test
Gets: per-class AP@0.5, mAP, PR curves
Stage 1 recall + E2E mAP side by side
Class dist, box sizes, image stats
Resolution vs BBBC041, cell size dist
Dataset stats, sample images, scale gap
Gets: binary parasitized AP@0.5 on unseen
BBBC041 vs MP-IDB recall gap analysis
Run 3–5 seeds on Stage 2 training → report mean ± std on val accuracy, per-class AP, mAP
Add confidence intervals to results table | Run after Improvements 1–3 are complete (depends on stable metrics)
Suggested order: 2.2 / 3.3 EDA first (can be done now) → 1.2 / 1.3 / 3.4 run on your machine → 2.3 Stage 1 v2 → Stat rigor
